tool_args.label: Public Hearing on FFY 2026 Federal Funding
tool_args.raw_text: In accordance with FTA regulations, a public hearing to solicit comments on projects proposed for federal funding was advertised beginning January 2, 2026. Written comments (via mail or the MTA.info website) were solicited, and a public hearing was held on Tuesday, February 3, 2026 (both in person and via Zoom)

payload.description: A public hearing to solicit comments on projects proposed for federal funding was held on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, both in person and via Zoom. Twelve members of the public gave testimony in-person and four provided comments virtually via Zoom. In addition, 41 online comments and two written notes were submitted.
payload.event_name: Capital Project Public Hearing for Federal Funding FFY 2026

payload.scope: MTA grand total for FFY 2026 federal funding package

tool_args.label: Public support for Interborough Express
tool_args.raw_text: there was significant support for large scale expansion projects, including the Interborough Express (IBX) and the proposed Second Avenue Subway 125th Street extension to Broadway.

payload.claim_text: There was significant support for large scale expansion projects, including the Interborough Express (IBX) and the proposed Second Avenue Subway 125th Street extension to Broadway.
payload.subject: Public hearing comments

tool_args.label: Public call to accelerate station accessibility
tool_args.raw_text: Participants stressed the need for the MTA to accelerate station accessibility projects stating that the 2055 timeline is too distant

payload.claim_text: Participants stressed the need for the MTA to accelerate station accessibility projects stating that the 2055 timeline is too distant, and supported faster and more effective construction of station elevators and replacement of older rail/bus fleets for more dependable service.
payload.subject: Public hearing comments

tool_args.label: Key themes from public hearing
tool_args.raw_text: Key themes included advocating for reliable service, prioritizing station accessibility, and improving rider experience and safety.

payload.claim_text: Key themes included advocating for reliable service, prioritizing station accessibility, and improving rider experience and safety.
payload.subject: Public hearing comments

tool_args.label: FFY 2026 package provides flexibility for multi-year planning
